1.description: This code is used if the organization is a central type organization (no group exemption) of a National, Regional or Geographic grouping of organizations.

2.description: This code is used if the organization is an intermediate organization (no group exemption) of a National, Regional or Geographic grouping of organizations (such as a state headquarters of a national organization).

3.description: This code is used if the organization is an independent organization or an independent auxiliary (i.e., not affiliated with a National, Regional, or Geographic grouping of organizations).

6.description: This code is used if the organization is a parent (group ruling) and is not a church or 501(c)(1) organization.

7.description: This code is used if the organization is an group exemption intermediate organization of a National, Regional or Geographic grouping of organizations.

8.description: This code is used if the organization is a parent (group ruling) and is a church or 501(c)(1) organization.

9.description: This code is used if the organization is a subordinate in a group ruling.
